description.content: Welcome to Hey Bear Sensory! A world of fun characters and colour, dancing to great music that the whole family will enjoy together!  On our channel you will find a broad selection of content, each one is built from scratch and animated by Wayne, the music is curated and selected by us; you can find titles to the tracks in the video descriptions.

accessibilityContext.label: Description. Welcome to Hey Bear Sensory! A world of fun characters and c...tap for more.

title.simpleText: Hey Bear Sensory
Hey Bear Sensory

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Hey Bear Sensory
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Welcome to Hey Bear Sensory! A world of fun characters and colour, dancing to great music that the whole family will enjoy together!  On our channel you will find a broad selection of content, each one is built from scratch and animated by Wayne, the music is curated and selected by us; you can find titles to the tracks in the video descriptions.

. Visit us at https://www.heybearsensory.com for news,  colouring in sheets and character cut outs that are great for parties, crafting and more!

. Hey Bear Sensory Store , for official plush, clothing and more!  https://heybearsensorystore.myshopify.com

. Hey Bear Sensory videos can be downloaded to watch offline from Wayokids


Hey Bear Sensory® | Hey Bear Productions, all rights reserved
Mindful Moon®| Hey Bear Productions , all rights reserved
Avocadosaurus | Hey Bear Productions, all rights reserved 
Copyright Hey Bear Productions 2025, all rights reserved

Welcome to Hey Bear Sensory! A world of fun characters and colour, dancing to great music that the whole family will enjoy together!  On our channel you will find a broad selection of content, each one is built from scratch and animated by Wayne, the music is curated and selected by us; you can find titles to the tracks in the video descriptions.
